# ChoiceNowNet - AI Driven Smart Life Portal

ChoiceNowNet is a collection of innovative digital products powered by AI and interactive technologies.

## Products

### AI Context English (Contexta)
- URL: https://contexta.choicenownet.site
- Description: Immersive English learning platform using AI to generate real-world contexts and stories.
- Key Features: AI real-time context generation, Ebbinghaus adaptive review, Lexile leveling.

### FinTap
- URL: https://fintap.choicenownet.site
- Description: 3D interactive virtual aquarium for work-life balance and relaxation.
- Key Features: 3D fish tank simulation, mobile-first design, interactive visual effects.

## Organization
ChoiceNowNet is dedicated to exploring the boundaries of AI in education and entertainment.
